label: Lupine Controls
description: Control the Lupine SL Grano F from the Karoo app or the in-ride field, with ride-aware connection handling and a Lupine-specific control surface.
releaseNotes:
* Added explicit connection result messages in English and German
* Pairing now stops automatically after 30 seconds
* Improved failure reporting for missing permissions, missing lamp, discovery errors, and BLE connection errors
* Updated published install metadata for the second beta
